tracks.label: Tutor Core
tracks.evidence: Deterministic Tutor, SAT, misconceptions and snapshots are implemented; regular suite and slow golden are green.
tracks.next_gate: Preserve regression stability while other layers evolve.

tracks.label: Diagnostic SBA Lab
tracks.evidence: 119-item bank deployed across 4 modes (Quick Drill 5, Express 10, Standard 25, Mock Theory 50); RA-preserving Mock Theory selection active; seeded Fisher-Yates rotation; Full Simulation integrates SBA 50 phase; governance flags clean.
tracks.next_gate: Reconcile eligibility engine scope (589 eligible) vs deployed 119.

tracks.label: Master Bank Foundation
tracks.evidence: 616 records; 590 single_best_answer, 26 open_response; eligibility engine: 589 SBA private_practice eligible, 36 public_lab; production generator deployed 119 (approved_private_sba + approved_for_static_demo); review_state metadata stale vs eligibility engine — reconciliation pending.
tracks.next_gate: Wire eligibility engine into generator to deploy full 589-item pool.

tracks.label: Open Response Lab
tracks.evidence: 26 items active (approved_open_response); 4 modes deployed (Short 1, Standard 2, Extended 4, Mock Theory Part 2 4); Full Simulation integrates OR 4-question phase; lab_payload_v3 schema; assessment intelligence (Phase X.1) embedded.
tracks.next_gate: Frontend assessment_intelligence consumer for adaptive feedback.

tracks.label: Adaptive Engine
tracks.evidence: Pedagogical rules and a base SBA composer exist; no adaptive 50-question runtime is implemented.
tracks.next_gate: Implement deterministic block-by-block adaptation against learner-state evidence.

tracks.label: Governed Generation
tracks.evidence: Governance and lifecycle contracts exist; no governed question-generation runtime is active.
tracks.next_gate: Complete evidence-backed readiness and approval contracts before implementation.

tracks.label: Knowledge Utilization Mapping

Phase X.4: SAT Readiness Validator (readiness_reasoning_patterns.json). Phase X.5: SAT Response Structure Validator (response_structures.json). All validator feedback rendered via answer_builder.py.
tracks.next_gate: Wire Tutor retrieval layer to consume Phase X.1 SAT assets adaptively.

tracks.label: Project State Engine

tracks.next_gate: Automate evidence collection and freshness validation without reading private learner artifacts.
